ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline of the athlete (e.g., Men, Ladies) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the athlete */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the athlete belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the athlete */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's profile image */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the athlete (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the club */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the club's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the club */,
  "president_name" TEXT /* Name of the club's president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the coach (e.g., Choreography, Technical) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the coach */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the coach's profile image */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certifications held by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline (e.g., Men, Ladies) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "skill_requirements" TEXT /* Skill requirements for the discipline */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines for the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the competition's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the athlete */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Placement of the athlete in the competition */,
  "short_program_score" REAL /* Score of the short program */,
  "free_skating_score" REAL /* Score of the free skating */,
  "technical_score" REAL /* Technical score */,
  "component_score" REAL /* Component score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., on-ice, off-ice) */,
  "focus" TEXT /* Focus of the training session (e.g., jumps, spins, footwork) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_schedules_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_schedules_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., Highest Score, Most Wins) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the statistic was recorded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic (e.g., performance, physical) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the statistic (e.g., points, seconds) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic (e.g., competition, practice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_statistics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete using the equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., Skates, Costume) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was purchased */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the equipment */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date for the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete sponsored */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "contract_value" TEXT /* Value of the sponsorship contract */,
  "contract_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsorship contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sponsorship (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., Photo, Video) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete associated with the media */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition associated with the media */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach associated with the media */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the media file's thumbnail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, data view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_club_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club affiliation */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the club affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the club affiliation */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for the athlete leaving the club */,
  "next_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next club the athlete joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_club_history_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_club_history_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_coach_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coaching relationship */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coaching relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coaching relationship */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for the athlete leaving the coach */,
  "next_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next coach the athlete worked with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_coach_history_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_coach_history_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_sponsorship_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "reason_for_ending" TEXT /* Reason for the sponsorship ending */,
  "next_sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next sponsorship the athlete received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_sponsorship_history_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_sponsorship_history_sponsorship_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsorship_id") REFERENCES sponsorships ("sponsorship_id")
)
